applies_when: User asks whether a car can be viewed without budget, need, or time facts
User wants a fast answer in a public comment
items.response_goal: Keep the reply warm while turning a vague used-car inquiry into usable visit facts.
do: Acknowledge the wish to come quickly
Ask for budget, main use case, preferred time, and whether this is a first visit
Keep the next step easy enough to answer in one message
avoid: Promising a specific car without facts
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我预算、主要是家用还是通勤、想来的时间，我可以先帮你把下一步收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user provides budget and time facts, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User says it is their first time or sounds unsure whether the car route suits them
User is unsure what model or budget route suits them
items.response_goal: Reduce uncertainty first, then guide the user toward a simple and safe visit path.
do: Offer a simple way to narrow the model or use-case route
Guide toward a low-pressure next step
avoid: Turning the reply into a hard sell
items.safe_transition: 第一次来看二手车先看适不适合很正常，我们可以先把你最在意的点和可来的时间理清楚。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user shares direction and timing, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User mentions a return-home, job-start, or replacement deadline soon
User needs a visit before a deadline
items.response_goal: Keep momentum high while collecting the exact time window and vehicle scope that decide whether the dealership can help.
do: Ask when the node is and when the user hopes to come
Guide the next step toward a suitable slot and vehicle fit
avoid: Guaranteeing all peak slots are available
Pushing a finance plan before the visit is scoped
items.safe_transition: 如果你把返乡、入职或换车的时间点和最想解决的部分告诉我，会更容易判断先约哪一类看车。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user shares date and timing, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User compares cars without use-case context
items.response_goal: Avoid empty price comparison by lightly recovering scope.
do: Ask what budget, model direction, or use case the user is asking about
avoid: Dumping long inventory lists in comments
Hiding the role of budget scope
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我是更偏家用、通勤、首台车还是新能源，价格回答会更准确一些。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user gives scope, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User says they came before or wants to return
User references their last visit, test drive, or family discussion
items.response_goal: Make the user feel recognized while surfacing what they want this time.
do: Ask what they want to continue or solve this time
Guide toward a smooth re-entry point
avoid: Treating a returning buyer like a cold lead
Jumping straight to a hard close
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我这次更想接着看哪一类车，我们就能更自然地帮你收窄下一步。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user shares prior context, route to FollowUp or Catcher.

applies_when: User talks about having a limited budget or being afraid of being fooled in public
The concern feels personal or money-sensitive
items.response_goal: Protect dignity in public while still keeping the path to help open.
do: Avoid repeating the user's wording harshly
Offer a light path into a more specific next step
avoid: Turning a sensitive comment into a hard conversion script
items.safe_transition: 这种担心很常见，不用急着给自己下结论。你如果愿意说下预算、场景和大概什么时间方便，我们可以先帮你看路径。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user continues with details, route to Catcher.
